name: Ion Striker
customPrimary: When hitting hull or armor, has a %s chance to arc to weapons and engines, dealing additional damage equal to the weapon's damage.

name: Pulse Cannon (Mounted)
customPrimary: Continuously arcs to weapons and engines when hitting hull or armor, dealing additional EMP and energy damage. When hitting shields, randomly generates shield-penetrating arcs based on target's hard flux level.

name: Airborne Mining Blaster
customPrimary: The projectile deals %s damage to armor that cannot be mitigated.

name: Airborne Tachyon Lance
customPrimary: Hits on hulls or armor generate arcs of lightning that strike weapons and engines, dealing additional EMP and energy damage. When hitting shields, it has a chance to bypass shields and strike the hull based on the target's hard flux level.

name: Airborne Gazer DEM
customPrimary: The DEM missile's graviton beam deals 1000 kinetic damage over 10s. Its performance is affected by missile skills rather than energy weapon skills.

name: "Skadi" Cryo-Cannon
customPrimary: The weapon's projectile speed is only 600 su/s, making it ineffective against fast targets.

name: Pulse Cannon
customPrimary: Continuously arcs to weapons and engines when hitting hull or armor, dealing additional EMP and energy damage. When hitting shields, randomly generates shield-penetrating arcs based on target's hard flux level.

name: "Spectre" Proximity Blast Cannon
tags: rare_bp,remnant, hist1t, merc, ind, he16, pd17
customPrimary: Energy projectiles explode when close to targets. The proximity trigger distance and explosion radius are 50 su and 125 su respectively. If no ships are in range, it targets fighters.

name: "Big Rip" Mining Torpedo
customPrimary: Torpedoes deal 1500 damage to armor, ignoring damage mitigation, and have a base penetration speed of 500 su/s.

name: "Rotoblade" Assault Autocannon
customPrimary: The weapon spread is fixed at 18° to the left and right, making long-range shooting completely impractical.

name: "Argus" DEM Launcher Pod
customPrimary: The DEM missile's graviton beam deals 1000 kinetic damage over 10s. Its performance is affected by missile skills rather than energy weapon skills.

name: Tesla Assault Lance
customPrimary: On hit, generates electromagnetic arcs that disable weapons and engines. When hitting shields, the arcs can bypass shields based on target hard flux level, always bypassing if hard flux is >= 50%.
customAncillary: The stats shown are the sum of both beams for this dual weapon; divide by 2 to get individual beam DPH.

name: "Narwhal" Heavy Cryo-Cannon
customPrimary: On hit, increases damage taken by target's shield by 15% for 8s. Repeated hits only refresh the duration.

name: "Monarch" Pulse Accelerator Cannon
customPrimary: The weapon has a 33% chance to trigger a small fragmentation explosion dealing 525 damage.

name: "Shredder" Slag Rapid-Fire Cannon
customPrimary: Slag projectiles deal 5 forced structural damage to the target. If the target's structural integrity is no greater than 20% of its maximum structure or 500 points, the weapon will trigger an ammunition explosion to execute the enemy.

name: "Big Rip" (Built-in)
customPrimary: Torpedoes deal 1500 damage to armor, ignoring damage mitigation, and have a base penetration speed of 500 su/s.
